summary: Frontend testing iteration 11 - Verified 'Snowy Experience' filter bug fix on Seasons page. All 6 test cases PASSED: Snowy Experience tab exists with snowflake icon, March shows 14 snow countries, December shows 24 snow countries, expected countries (Switzerland, Austria, Japan, Canada, France) all present, count badge updates when month changes.
passed_tests: TEST 1: Seasons page loads successfully with [data-testid='seasons-page-title']
TEST 2: Snowy Experience tab exists with snowflake icon [data-testid='category-tab-snow']
TEST 3: With March selected, Snowy Experience shows 14 countries (expected: 14)
TEST 4: With December selected, Snowy Experience shows 24 countries (expected: 24)
TEST 5: Expected snow countries found - Switzerland (CHE), Austria (AUT), Japan (JPN), Canada (CAN), France (FRA)
TEST 6: Category count badge updates when month changes (March: 14, December: 24, January: 23)
critical_code_review_comments: Seasons.js line 22: snow category correctly defined with Snowflake icon, sky color scheme
Seasons.js lines 553-559: categoryFilteredData filters peak season countries by category including 'snow'
Seasons.js lines 562-573: categoryCounts calculates count for each category from peak season countries
Database update successful: 24 countries now have 'snow' in categories array with winter months (Dec, Jan, Feb, Mar) in best_months
seed_data_creation: None - database already updated with snow categories
context_for_next_testing_agent: Snowy Experience filter bug is FIXED. Database updated with 24 snow countries. Filter shows: March=14, December=24, January=23 snow destinations. Expected countries (Switzerland, Austria, Japan, Canada, France) all present with 'Snow' category tag visible on country cards.

bug_fix_verification.original_issue: Snowy Experience filter on Seasons page showed 0 results even when changing months
bug_fix_verification.fix_applied: Added 'snow' category to 24 countries in MongoDB and updated their best_months to include winter months (Dec, Jan, Feb, Mar)
bug_fix_verification.verification_result: FIXED - Filter now correctly shows 14-24 snow countries depending on selected month

test_screenshots: .screenshots/march_snow_countries.png - Shows filtered snow countries for March (14 countries)
.screenshots/december_snow_countries.png - Shows filtered snow countries for December (24 countries)
.screenshots/december_snow_countries_scrolled.png - Shows additional snow countries with Snow tag visible
